mapper.sql: budget_id, budget_code, budget_name, scheme_id, scheme_code, scheme_name, plan_year, total_budget, allocated_amount, remaining_amount, budget_status, version_no, last_check_status, last_check_time, process_instance_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_budget WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM invest_budget WHERE scheme_id = #{schemeId} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invest_budget ( budget_code, budget_name, scheme_id, scheme_code, scheme_name, plan_year, total_budget, allocated_amount, remaining_amount, budget_status, version_no, last_check_status, last_check_time, process_instance_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{budgetCode}, #{budgetName}, #{schemeId}, #{schemeCode}, #{schemeName}, #{planYear}, #{totalBudget}, #{allocatedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{budgetStatus}, #{versionNo}, #{lastCheckStatus}, #{lastCheckTime}, #{processInstanceId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE invest_budget
budget_code = #{budgetCode}, budget_name = #{budgetName}, scheme_id = #{schemeId}, scheme_code = #{schemeCode}, scheme_name = #{schemeName}, plan_year = #{planYear}, total_budget = #{totalBudget}, allocated_amount = #{allocatedAmount}, remaining_amount = #{remainingAmount}, budget_status = #{budgetStatus}, version_no = #{versionNo}, last_check_status = #{lastCheckStatus}, last_check_time = #{lastCheckTime}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId} AND del_flag = '0'

UPDATE invest_budget SET allocated_amount = #{allocatedAmount}, remaining_amount = #{remainingAmount}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId} AND del_flag = '0'

UPDATE invest_budget SET last_check_status = #{lastCheckStatus}, last_check_time = #{lastCheckTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete:
UPDATE invest_budget SET del_flag = '2' WHERE budget_id IN
#{budgetId}
